mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM admin_user_role ur INNER JOIN admin_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN admin_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN admin_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id AND p.status = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{adminId} ORDER BY p.permission_code ASC

select p.id, p.menu_id as menuId, m.menu_name as menuName, p.permission_code as permissionCode, p.permission_name as permissionName, p.permission_type as permissionType, p.request_method as requestMethod, p.request_path as requestPath, p.status, p.remark from admin_permission p left join admin_menu m on p.menu_id = m.id and m.is_deleted = 0 where p.is_deleted = 0 order by m.sort asc, p.menu_id asc, p.id asc
